DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF ROSS PSYHOGIOS' MOTION TO QUASH DEFENDANTS JEROME VITENSON AND C. COURNALE AND CO. INC.'S DEPOSITION SUBPOENA IS DENIED; HIS MOTION TO MODIFY THE SUBPOENA LIMITING THE PRODUCTION TO "MEDICAL RECORDS OF PLAINTIFF'S RESPIRATORY CONDITION INCLUDING, BUT NOT LIMITED TO, CHEST X-RAYS, CHEST CT SCANS, CHEST IMAGING, ALLERGY TESTS, EVALUATION FOR ALLERGIES, PULMONARY TEST, PULMONARY FUNCTIONING, ASTHMA TESTING, EVALUATION FOR ASTHMA, AND ANY CONDITIONS OF COUGHING, WHEEZING, NASAL CONGESTION OR DIFFICULTY BREATHING" IS GRANTED. THERE IS INSUFFICIENT EVIDENCE AT THIS POINT THAT PLAINTIFF IS CLAIMING ANY MEDICAL INJURY BEYOND HIS RESPIRATORY CLAIMS TO JUSTIFY THE INVASION OF HIS PRIVACY SOUGHT BY DEFENDANT. NO MONETARY SANCTIONS WILL BE IMPOSED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO-TEM: PAUL RENNE; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

Motion to Compel currently set for October 5, 2018 in department 501 shall also be heard in Department 301 at 9:00 a.m. Courtesy copies of all future filings in support of and in opposition to these motions shall be delivered directly to department 301. Off Calendar May-07-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ROSS PSYHOGIOS' MOTION TO QUASH (NOTICES).

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Transferred to department 301 to be heard at 9:00 a.m. on May 7, 2018. Judge: Ronald Quidachay, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/REQ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash
Off Calendar May-07-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. Trevor L. Ross of the Hannig Law, Tel. No. 1-650-482-3040 appearing for the plaintiff;
No other appearances on the matter.


Ruling - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Ross Psyhogios' motion to quash defendants Jerome Vitenson and C. Cournale and Co. Inc.'s deposition subpoena is denied; his motion to modify the subpoena limiting the production to "medical records of plaintiff's respiratory condition including, but not limited to, chest x-rays, chest CT scans, chest imaging, allergy tests, evaluation for allergies, pulmonary test, pulmonary functioning, asthma testing, evaluation for asthma, and any conditions of coughing, wheezing, nasal congestion or difficulty breathing" is granted. There is insufficient evidence at this point that plaintiff is claiming any medical injury beyond his respiratory claims to justify the invasion of his privacy sought by defendant. No monetary sanctions will be imposed. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro-tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/jpt
